text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, February 16. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
